segments.text: He's coming back with some mashing, dash attack attempt, but Nao-chan punishes with up tilt! Diddy Kong—
segments.original_text: に帰ってくるそしてパンチで暴れてダッシュアタックだったんですがここは上強で差し返しますなおちゃディディー
さあなおちゃ選手横強攻撃

full_text: He's coming back with some mashing, dash attack attempt, but Nao-chan punishes with up tilt! Diddy Kong— Nao-chan with the forward tilt!

corrections.rule: player name: 直茶→なおちゃ
